name: CURIS INC
business: Curis Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on developing emavusertib, an oral small molecule inhibitor of IRAK4 and FLT3, for the treatment of hematologic malignancies including primary central nervous system lymphoma, chronic lymphocytic leukemia, and acute myeloid leukemia.
sellsTo: patients with relapsed/refractory primary central nervous system lymphoma

exposures.sentence: We are a biotechnology company focused on the development of emavusertib (CA-4948), an orally available, small molecule inhibitor of Interleukin-1 receptor associated kinase, or IRAK4 and FMS-like tyrosine kinase 3 or FLT3.

catalysts.event: Initial data from TakeAim CLL Phase 2 study
catalysts.sentence: We began activating sites during the fourth quarter of 2025 and expect to initiate dosing during the first half of 2026, with initial data expected in the fourth quarter of 2026.
